parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT e.user_id, e.persona FROM research.voc_entries e WHERE e.persona IS NOT NULL AND e.first_seen >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month') AND e.first_seen < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE);

SELECT e.dimension, e.text, e.frequency, e.trend, e.funnel_stage, e.source_platform FROM research.voc_entries e WHERE e.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND e.persona = '{{ $json.persona.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AND e.first_seen >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month') AND e.first_seen < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY e.frequency DESC;

INSERT INTO research.persona_reports (user_id, persona, report_month, title, content_json, content_md, entry_count, dimension_breakdown, language_shifts) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.persona.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.report_month }}'::date, '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.content_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.content_md.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.entry_count }}, '{{ $json.dimension_breakdown }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.language_shifts }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (user_id, persona, report_month) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, content_json = EXCLUDED.content_json, content_md = EXCLUDED.content_md, entry_count = EXCLUDED.entry_count, dimension_breakdown = EXCLUDED.dimension_breakdown, language_shifts = EXCLUDED.language_shifts;
